create_user_description: Add a new user to the system. They will be able to sign in immediately.
password_min_length: Password must be at least 8 characters
confirm_delete_description: Are you sure you want to delete user "{{name}}" ({{email}})? This action cannot be undone.
role_admin_description: Full access — manages projects, forms, reservations, payments and other users.
role_enduser_description: Read-only access to the projects explicitly assigned by an admin.
create_user_as_enduser_description: An invite link will be generated. The end user picks their own password and can be assigned to one or more projects.
invite_resent: Invite (re)issued. The new link was emailed to the user and is also shown below for manual delivery.
revite_invite_description: Any invite link the user has not yet claimed will stop working. You can issue a fresh one afterwards.
invite_required_password: Leave the password empty — the end user will set it via the invite link.
must_set_password: Has not set a password yet
project_assignments_help: Select the projects this end user can see in their portal. They will get read-only access to forms, reservations and payments on those projects.
no_project_assignments: This user is not yet assigned to any project.
enduser_landing_intro: End users are read-only — they sign in to a customer portal and see only the projects you assign to them.
